curation_notes: Patch modifies only lib/elliptic/ec/signature.js (1 file). The getLength function lacked bounds on octetLen and did not apply unsigned right-shift (>>>= 0) after bit-shifting, causing integer overflow for crafted DER length fields. The _importDER function did not check getLength return values for false and accepted leading-zero-padded R/S components. The sibling lib/elliptic/eddsa/signature.js uses a completely different parsing approach (fixed-length byte splitting) and does not share this vulnerability. Pre-assigned class integer-overflow (CWE-190) is correct — the core code defect is unbounded bit-shift arithmetic in DER length decoding.
